_description: Python DB Write Allowlist — historical baseline. ALLOWLIST DOES NOT AUTHORIZE RUNTIME DB WRITES. Each entry is a pre-existing file with DB write risk that was classified in python_sql_migration_enforcement_design_phase1. New or modified Python files with DB write signals that are NOT in this allowlist will fail CI changed-files enforcement.

entries.reason: Schema DDL + data DML: CREATE TABLE, ALTER TABLE, DROP TRIGGER, INSERT, UPDATE, execute_values bulk insert. No Python guard equivalent. RISK: HIGH.
entries.evidence: psycopg2 import + execute_values + CREATE TABLE/INSERT/UPDATE in executable code. See SC002_PYTHON_SQL_MIGRATION_ENFORCEMENT_DESIGN.md #163.
entries.expires_or_review_note: Must be guarded in Phase 2C before any real DB write is authorized. Do NOT mark safe.

entries.reason: Core data write store: INSERT INTO matches, INSERT INTO raw_match_data, INSERT INTO matches_mapping, UPDATE matches with ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE. No Python guard equivalent. RISK: HIGH.
entries.evidence: psycopg2 via pool + execute + INSERT/UPDATE with ON CONFLICT in executable code. See SC002_PYTHON_SQL_MIGRATION_ENFORCEMENT_DESIGN.md #164.
entries.expires_or_review_note: Must be guarded in Phase 2C before any real DB write is authorized. Do NOT mark safe.

entries.expires_or_review_note: Must be guarded in Phase 2C before any real DB write is authorized. Do NOT mark safe.
